candidate_definition_hints.text: 🧠 A native graph-based memory system for autonomous AI agents, featuring bio-inspired sleep-based memory consolidation and powered by KIP & AndaDB.
> Burn electricity to train large models, and you get a neural network ontology; burn tokens to train a memory graph, and you get a symbolic network ontology.

candidate_glosses.text: > Burn electricity to train large models, and you get a neural network ontology; burn tokens to train a memory graph, and you get a symbolic network ontology.
